title: api_abuse
description: An attacker discovers an undocumented API endpoint with no authentication, using it to enumerate user accounts and extract sensitive profile data at scale.

timeline.title: Unusual API Traffic
timeline.description: API gateway metrics show a spike in requests to /api/v1/users/lookup — an undocumented endpoint — from a single IP address making 10,000 requests per hour.

timeline.title: Unauthenticated Access Confirmed
timeline.description: The endpoint returns full user profile data including names, emails, and phone numbers with no authentication required. User enumeration is trivially possible.

timeline.title: Mass Data Extraction
timeline.description: Estimated 200,000 user records have been extracted over the past 4 hours. The data includes PII that may be used for targeted phishing or sold on criminal marketplaces.

timeline.title: Endpoint Disabled
timeline.description: The undocumented API endpoint is disabled. Rate limiting applied to all API endpoints. Attacker IP blocked at the gateway.

timeline.title: API Security Audit Initiated
timeline.description: Full audit of all API endpoints for authentication, authorisation, and data exposure issues begun. Shadow APIs being catalogued.

timeline.title: Breach Notification Issued
timeline.description: Affected users notified. Regulatory authority informed. API gateway enhanced with authentication enforcement and rate limiting for all routes.

node-1.title: Unauthenticated API Endpoint Being Abused
node-1.situation: API gateway logs show an IP making 10,000 requests per hour to /api/v1/users/lookup. This undocumented endpoint returns full user PII with no authentication. An estimated 200,000 records are at risk.
node-1.question: What is your immediate action?

options.label: A
options.text: Disable the endpoint immediately, block the abusing IP at the API gateway, and engage the IR team to assess the scope of data extracted.

options.label: B
options.text: Rate-limit the endpoint to 100 requests per minute while investigating — this will slow the extraction without taking it offline.

options.label: C
options.text: Add authentication to the endpoint without disabling it first, so legitimate internal users are not disrupted.

node-2.title: Scope the Data Extraction
node-2.situation: API gateway logs show the extraction started 4 hours before detection. Approximately 200,000 user records including names, emails, and phone numbers were extracted. Breach notification obligations must be assessed.
node-2.question: How do you manage the breach?

options.label: A
options.text: Engage the DPO to assess breach notification requirements, prepare user notifications, and notify the supervisory authority within the regulatory deadline.

options.label: B
options.text: Quietly patch the endpoint and monitor for misuse of the extracted data without issuing breach notifications.

node-3.title: Audit All API Endpoints
node-3.situation: This incident reveals that undocumented shadow APIs may exist elsewhere. A full API inventory and security audit is needed to identify other unauthenticated or over-permissive endpoints.
node-3.question: How do you audit your API security posture?

options.label: A
options.text: Conduct a full API discovery exercise using traffic analysis and code review to build an inventory, then assess each endpoint for authentication, authorisation, and data minimisation.

options.label: B
options.text: Only review the endpoints listed in the official API documentation and assume undocumented endpoints are not accessible externally.

node-4.title: Implement API Security Controls
node-4.situation: The audit identifies three more endpoints with missing authentication. All must be secured. You also need gateway-level controls to enforce authentication and rate limiting consistently.
node-4.question: What API security controls do you implement?

options.label: A
options.text: Enforce authentication on all API endpoints via the API gateway, implement rate limiting and quota controls, deploy API security scanning in CI/CD, and require API versioning with documentation for all routes.

options.label: B
options.text: Only add authentication to the three newly identified endpoints and close the audit.

node-5.title: Scenario Complete
node-5.situation: The unauthenticated API endpoint was disabled and the breach was scoped at 200,000 records. Regulatory notifications were timely, a full API audit discovered additional vulnerabilities, and gateway-level authentication enforcement now protects all endpoints.
node-5.question: Scenario complete. Well done!
